name: AACarga_ZDerechos_GruposRoles

relations_found.evidence: FROM LUCCA187 U1 Left Join LUCCA411 P1 On P1.Codigo=U1.Rol  ...

wl_code:
BuscaQry is Data Source
TableDeleteAll(TABLE_GruposDerechos)
IF HExecuteSQLQuery(BuscaQry, MyConnectionLucca, hQueryWithoutCorrection + hNoBind,
"SELECT U1.Codigo, U1.Renglon, P1.Descripcion " + ...
" FROM LUCCA187 U1 Left Join LUCCA411 P1 On P1.Codigo=U1.Rol  " + ...
"Where U1.Codigo=" + Usuarios.CODIGO + " Order by U1.Renglon ") = False THEN
Error("HFSQL error: " + HErrorInfo())
END
HReadFirst(BuscaQry)
LOOP (HNbRec(BuscaQry))
TableAddLine(TABLE_GruposDerechos, BuscaQry.Codigo, BuscaQry.Renglon, BuscaQry.Descripcion)
HReadNext(BuscaQry)
END
Local procedure AACarga_ZDerechos_Nomina
